notes: Drag a song to reorder it inside a playlist — grab any row and drop it where you want; long lists auto-scroll while you drag. Dragging is offered only when the view still shows the playlist's own order, so a sorted, filtered or pinned list cannot be reordered into a surprise. The permanent track counter next to the search box is gone (the count is already in each view's subtitle), and the sort selector moved down beside the column headers it applies to.
